title: Client tools 与 server tools 的区别

body.itemA: Client tools：在你的应用中运行。包括你自定义的函数，以及 Anthropic 提供 schema 的工具（bash、text_editor）。Claude 返回 tool_use block，你本地执行后发回 tool_result。
body.itemB: Server tools：在 Anthropic 基础设施上运行。包括 web_search、code_execution、web_fetch、tool_search。你只需在请求中声明它们，Anthropic 执行并直接在响应中返回结果。

dimensions.name: 需要处理 tool_result？
dimensions.b: 否——结果自动出现在响应中

dimensions.name: 接入成本
dimensions.b: 只需在请求中声明工具类型

body_en.itemA: Client tools: run in YOUR application. Includes user-defined functions and Anthropic-schema tools (bash, text_editor). Claude returns a tool_use block, you execute it locally, and send back a tool_result.
body_en.itemB: Server tools: run on Anthropic's infrastructure. Includes web_search, code_execution, web_fetch, and tool_search. You just declare them in the request — Anthropic handles execution and returns results directly in the response.

dimensions.name: Handle tool_result?
dimensions.a: Yes — you must send results back

dimensions.name: Setup effort
dimensions.b: Just declare the tool type in the request
